-- This script was generated by the ERD tool in pgAdmin 4.
-- Please log an issue at https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4/issues/new/choose if you find any bugs, including reproduction steps.
BEGIN;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.lego_colors
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    rgb character varying(6) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    is_trans character(1) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT lego_colors_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.lego_inventories
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    version integer NOT NULL,
    set_num character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT lego_inventories_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.lego_inventory_parts
(
    inventory_id integer NOT NULL,
    part_num character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    color_id integer NOT NULL,
    quantity integer NOT NULL,
    is_spare boolean NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.lego_inventory_sets
(
    inventory_id integer NOT NULL,
    set_num character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    quantity integer NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.lego_part_categories
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT lego_part_categories_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.lego_parts
(
    part_num character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    part_cat_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT lego_parts_pkey PRIMARY KEY (part_num)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.lego_sets
(
    set_num character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    year integer,
    theme_id integer,
    num_parts integer,
    CONSTRAINT lego_sets_pkey PRIMARY KEY (set_num)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.lego_themes
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    parent_id integer,
    CONSTRAINT lego_themes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
END;
